global_hint: System Breach Detected. Multiple logs exist. Verify targets before acting.
tasks: Phase 1 (Recon): Locate the initial fragmented auth flag hidden in the vault.
Phase 2 (Crypto): Extract and decode the multi-layer base64/hex payload from the syslog.
Phase 3 (Privilege): Inspect the system environment variables to secure the root session.
Phase 4 (Integrity): Restore the corrupted nginx.conf file using the clean backup.
Phase 5 (Hardening): Lock down the /etc/shadow file permissions to strict 600.
Phase 6 (Purge): Quarantine and permanently remove the 'sysupdater' malware binary.
